title: Apple Sends Letters to Dozens of Former Employees Now at OpenAI
content_html:
Apple Sends Letters to Dozens of Former Employees Now at OpenAI

Michael Acton, reporting for the Financial Times from San Francisco:

About 40 former employees now working at OpenAI have been sent letters directing them to preserve documents and communications and demanding meetings with Apple’s lawyers, according to multiple people familiar with the matter. Apple and OpenAI declined to comment.

The decision to hit employees with personal legal letters highlights Apple’s aggressive tactics after it last week launched a blockbuster lawsuit accusing OpenAI and two employees of stealing secret hardware plans.

★ Saturday, 18 July 2026

Apple and OpenAI declined to comment. The decision to hit employees with personal legal letters highlights Apple’s aggressive tactics after it last week launched a blockbuster lawsuit accusing OpenAI and two employees of stealing secret hardware plans. ★ Saturday, 18 July 2026

sentences.en: Apple Sends Letters to Dozens of Former Employees Now at OpenAI
sentences.zh: Apple 致函 OpenAI 的数十名前员工

blocks.html_en:
Michael Acton, reporting for the Financial Times from San Francisco:

About 40 former employees now working at OpenAI have been sent letters directing them to preserve documents and communications and demanding meetings with Apple’s lawyers, according to multiple people familiar with the matter. Apple and OpenAI declined to comment.

The decision to hit employees with personal legal letters highlights Apple’s aggressive tactics after it last week launched a blockbuster lawsuit accusing OpenAI and two employees of stealing secret hardware plans.

★ Saturday, 18 July 2026

sentences.en: Michael Acton, reporting for the Financial Times from San Francisco: About 40 former employees now working at OpenAI have been sent letters directing them to preserve documents and communications and demanding meetings with Apple’s lawyers, according to multiple people familiar with the matter.
sentences.zh: 迈克尔·阿克顿（Michael Acton）在旧金山为英国《金融时报》报道：据多位知情人士透露，目前在 OpenAI 工作的大约 40 名前员工已收到信件，指示他们保存文件和通讯内容，并要求与苹果律师会面。

sentences.en: Apple and OpenAI declined to comment.
sentences.zh: 苹果和 OpenAI 拒绝置评。

sentences.en: The decision to hit employees with personal legal letters highlights Apple’s aggressive tactics after it last week launched a blockbuster lawsuit accusing OpenAI and two employees of stealing secret hardware plans. ★ Saturday, 18 July 2026
sentences.zh: 用个人法律信件打击员工的决定凸显了苹果公司的激进策略，此前该公司上周发起了一场轰动一时的诉讼，指控 OpenAI 和两名员工窃取秘密硬件计划。 ★ 2026 年 7 月 18 日，星期六

content_html_zh:
Apple 致函 OpenAI 的数十名前员工
迈克尔·阿克顿（Michael Acton）在旧金山为英国《金融时报》报道：据多位知情人士透露，目前在 OpenAI 工作的大约 40 名前员工已收到信件，指示他们保存文件和通讯内容，并要求与苹果律师会面。 苹果和 OpenAI 拒绝置评。 用个人法律信件打击员工的决定凸显了苹果公司的激进策略，此前该公司上周发起了一场轰动一时的诉讼，指控 OpenAI 和两名员工窃取秘密硬件计划。 ★ 2026 年 7 月 18 日，星期六
